assertions.title: LintGate runs checks and reports pass/fail

steps.observed: LintGate runs cargo clippy and parses JSON output for errors/warnings

evidence.testOutput: cargo test completed successfully with exit code 0
evidence.implementation: LintGate validates by running 'cargo clippy --message-format json' and checking exit status

assertions.title: TestGate runs test suite and reports results

steps.observed: TestGate runs 'cargo test -- --format pretty' and reports pass/fail status

evidence.testOutput: All 14 tests passed; 0 failed; 0 ignored; 0 measured
evidence.implementation: TestGate validates by running cargo test and capturing stdout/stderr for reporting

assertions.title: ValidationPipeline runs multiple gates in order

steps.observed: ValidationPipeline::run() iterates through gates and awaits each validate() call

steps.expected: Gates have order() method for sequencing
steps.observed: LintGate order=10, TestGate order=20, SecurityGate order=30, AiReviewGate order=40

evidence.implementation: ValidationPipeline stores Vec<Box<dyn ValidationGate>>, runs them sequentially via run() method, aggregates all_passed and all_messages

steps.action: Code review of ValidationContext usage in gates
steps.expected: Context provides workspace_path and other required data
steps.observed: All gates clone workspace_path from context.workspace_path
async fn validate(&self, context: ValidationContext) -> Result<ValidationOutcome, SwellError>

evidence.testOutput: cargo test completed successfully - all tests use ValidationContext properly
evidence.implementation: ValidationContext defined in swell-core, gates consume context and pass to spawned blocking tasks

summary: Tested 4 assertions: All passed. cargo test -p swell-validation ran 14 tests successfully (confidence and evidence modules). LintGate, TestGate, ValidationPipeline, and ValidationContext usage all verified working correctly.
